description: CompositionGrey shirt made of blended fabric, has a round neckline with contrast panelling, long sleeves with mid button tabs, pockets on the front with contrast panelling, a full buttoned placket, contrast panelling on the shoulder, inverted pleat at the back and a curved hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleachDo not wringUse warm ironCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish shirt from femella. The blended fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sandals for that perfect girly look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
